name: Spatial Metabolic Pathway Activity
description: Compute spatial metabolic pathway activity on clustered spatial transcriptomics data using gseapy ssGSEA. Produces per-spot pathway scores, cluster-level top pathway summaries, optional spatial smoothing/plots, and a detailed English text report covering parameters, data stats, and pathway highlights. Gene set libraries are fetched via gseapy/Enrichr (requires network access) and are restricted to supported presets.

spatial_key.description: obsm key containing spatial coordinates; if missing, obs must include 'x','y'

cluster_key.description: obs column name containing cluster labels

species.description: Species for pathway gene sets (use human or mouse; other values are not supported by the preset libraries)

gene_id_type.description: Gene ID type in expression matrix; ensembl will be mapped to symbol where possible

gene_set_library.description: Pathway gene set library to use. Supported presets only: msigdb_hallmark_kegg (MSigDB_Hallmark_2020 + KEGG_2021_Human/KEGG_2019_Mouse), msigdb_hallmark (MSigDB_Hallmark_2020), kegg (KEGG_2021_Human/KEGG_2019_Mouse), reactome (Reactome_2022). Custom library names such as 'Hallmark' will be rejected.

smooth_scores.description: Whether to spatially smooth pathway scores using neighborhood graph

knn_k.description: k for kNN neighborhood (used when radius is null)

radius.description: Optional radius for neighborhood construction; if null, use kNN

sigma.description: Gaussian kernel sigma for smoothing weights

top_pathways_per_cluster.description: Number of top pathways to report per cluster

chunk_size.description: Chunk size for pathway scoring to control memory

min_size.description: Minimum gene set size for ssGSEA

max_size.description: Maximum gene set size for ssGSEA

file.description: Clustered spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) with spatial coordinates and cluster labels

output_config.collection_description: Outputs pathway activity scores, cluster summaries, text report, and optional spatial plots.

items.description: Per-spot/cell pathway activity scores (wide CSV). Columns: obs_id plus one column per pathway with ssGSEA scores.
Cluster-level mean pathway scores with top pathways per cluster

Detailed English text report (UTF-8) covering parameters, data overview (observations, genes, clusters), gene set choice, smoothing settings, score distribution, top pathways per cluster, and output file references.
